description: Create a profit monitoring gauge for the Technology sector using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. Create a Dial visualization showing Profit for the 'Technology' Product Category with a maximum scale of 200,000 and a target line at 150,000. Configure status thresholds to show performance ranges (e.g., Red for low, Green for high). Title the chart 'Technology Profit Monitor' and save the workbook as 'Profit_Gauge_Analysis'.
